sentences.arabic: التَّمْرُ فَاكِهَةٌ مُهِمَّةٌ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Hurme su važno voće u arapskoj kulturi.
sentences.translationEn: Dates are an important fruit in Arab culture.

sentences.arabic: يَأْكُلُ النَّاسُ التَّمْرَ فِي كُلِّ مُنَاسَبَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi jedu hurme na svakoj prigodi.
sentences.translationEn: People eat dates on every occasion.

sentences.translation: Hurme se poslužuju gostima uz kafu.
sentences.translationEn: Dates are served to guests with coffee.

sentences.translation: Hurme su slatke i pune energije.
sentences.translationEn: Dates are sweet and have great energy.

sentences.arabic: نَخْلَةُ التَّمْرِ رَمْزٌ مَعْرُوفٌ فِي البِلَادِ العَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Palmina stabljika je poznat simbol u arapskim zemljama.
sentences.translationEn: The date palm is a well-known symbol in Arab countries.
